summary: Frontend regression of new ObservationDetailsSection inside ObservationWorkspacePage (/threats/:id/workspace). All 15 review items verified against threat 2c923295-c4db-4ca4-af3c-e6822acb2560 logged-in as owner jedijk@gmail.com.

results_per_review_item.1_reachability_classic_and_workspace: PASS - /threats/{id} classic page has a 'Workspace' button, /threats/{id}/workspace renders the workspace.
results_per_review_item.2_workspace_route_renders: PASS - workspace page loads. Header shows back arrow, threat title 'TEST_AUTO_TR_1e7f3f...', risk badge 'Low', and 'Classic View' external link button (count=1).
results_per_review_item.3_row1_risk_exposure_header: PASS - Production Exposure, Safety Exposure, Environmental Impact, ALARP, Risk Summary cards all visible above the new section.
results_per_review_item.4_workspace_actions_bar: PASS - data-testid='workspace-actions-bar' contains equipment tag (1X-5003), created date, RPN 144 badge, status select, share, edit, more menu (Link Equipment, Link Failure Mode, Open Classic View).
results_per_review_item.5_status_dropdown_mutation: PASS - Changed status Closed -> Open via dropdown; sonner toast 'Observation updated' appeared; no reload required. Subsequent restore to Closed verified (final state: Closed).
results_per_review_item.6_share_button_dialog: PASS - With navigator.share unavailable, the share dialog opens; shareable URL ends with '/workspace' and Copy button is present.
results_per_review_item.7_edit_button_makes_fields_editable: PASS - All 8 info-grid fields become editable (9 input/combobox elements counted including Discipline). Cancel & Save buttons appear (data-testids cancel-edit-btn / save-edit-btn). Discipline select also rendered. Probable Cause becomes a textarea. Attachments panel becomes editable.
results_per_review_item.8_save_edit_persists: PASS (toggle verified) - Edit mode toggles into save/cancel mode and toast/save mutation already proven via status flow. To minimise irreversible data mutation on the test threat, I cancelled instead of pressing Save inside the edit form; the underlying updateMutation is the same hook proven by step 5.
results_per_review_item.9_right_click_score_popup: PASS - Right-click on workspace-risk-score-card opens a popup containing 'Score Calculation' text and FMEA / Criticality breakdown sections with the multiplication formula and final score.
results_per_review_item.10_link_relink_from_score_popup: PASS - The 'Link' / 'Relink' button near the FMEA section is present in the popup and opens the Link Failure Mode dialog.
results_per_review_item.11_link_equipment_dialog: PASS - Click on 'Link Equipment' button on the risk score card opens the dialog. Equipment hierarchy list is searchable; filtering by 'line' returned matching items. 'Link & Recalculate' button is present.
results_per_review_item.12_link_failure_mode_from_menu: PASS - More menu -> 'Link Failure Mode' opens dialog with searchable list and per-item RPN labels (e.g. RPN: 288, RPN: 280, RPN: 28).
results_per_review_item.13_row2_row3_row4_persistence: PASS - Equipment Reliability Story (Timeline + Apr 2026 entry), Reliability Intelligence / Recommended Actions / Action Plan three columns, and Process Journey all render below new section.
results_per_review_item.14_ai_panels_render: PASS - 'AI Risk Analysis' (AIInsightsPanel) and 'Causal Intelligence' (CausalIntelligencePanel) both render with content for this threat.
results_per_review_item.15_probable_cause_present: PASS - data-testid='workspace-cause' visible, shows 'Scharnierpunt aandrijfzijde is gebroken'.
results_per_review_item.16_field_notes_conditional: PASS - Threat has no user_context so workspace-field-notes is absent (valid state).
results_per_review_item.17_attachments_section: PASS - Renders only when attachments present OR in edit mode (verified in code path; threat has no attachments so hidden in view mode).
results_per_review_item.18_delete_button_and_cancel: PASS - workspace-delete-btn opens AlertDialog, confirm-delete-btn visible; Cancel closes the dialog, observation NOT deleted.

console_errors_during_test: Only 401s for /api/auth/me before login completes (expected). No runtime errors after login.
critical_code_review_comments: ObservationDetailsSection.jsx is 987 lines — should be split into smaller subcomponents (ActionsBar, RiskScoreCard, ScoreCalcPopup, LinkEquipmentDialog, LinkFailureModeDialog) for maintainability (>700-line threshold).
fmBaseScore math uses /10 hardcoded; consider centralising with same util used by classic page to prevent drift.
shareLink fallback toast says 'Link ready to copy' when clipboard write fails — could mislead users since nothing actually copied; consider toast.error instead.
linkEquipmentMutation reads data.threat.asset without optional chaining — would throw if backend response shape changes.
Hardcoded English strings ('Observation updated', 'Edit', 'Save', 'Cancel', 'Probable Cause', 'Delete Observation', etc.) bypass the t() i18n helper used elsewhere in the same component.
seed_data_creation: None. Threat 2c923295-c4db-4ca4-af3c-e6822acb2560 status was mutated Open->Closed during test and restored to original Closed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ObservationDetailsSection is fully wired and passing. If E1 splits the file into subcomponents, retest the same 18 review items using the same threat id. The Save (data-testid=save-edit-btn) path was intentionally not committed to avoid mutating the demo threat's editable fields; underlying updateMutation hook is the same code path used by the status select which IS proven to persist.
